description: Boundary drift could pull provider transport, conversation, scheduling, or delivery into Ledger, or let Hermes reproduce financial rules, creating two sources of truth and avoidable service coupling.
mitigation: Enforce ADR-CORE-0030 and ARCH-CORE-TALLY-SYSTEM-CONTEXT: Ledger exposes provider-neutral typed contracts only; Hermes owns orchestration and delivery; either system must use public contracts rather than the other system private state.
